name: Berry Muffins
recipeIngredient: Non-nutritive sweetener to equal 1/4 cup + 2 Tbsp sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Grease a 12 muffin tin (2 1/2").
3. Combine the biscuit mix and sweetener equivalent to 1/4 cup + 2 tablespoons sugar in a bowl; add yogurt.
4. Add egg; beat with a fork until well combined.
5. Gently fold berries into the batter using a rubber spatula; place about 1/4 cup batter into each muffin cup.
6. Combine lemon peel and remaining sweetener, mixing well.
7. Sprinkle over the batter; bake until golden brown (20 to 25 minutes).
8. Serve hot.
Yields 12 muffins. Per serving: 1 muffin - Bread, 1/2 Fat Calories: 104
